urls._rationale: Downgrade axe 'incomplete' (needsFurtherReview) entries to notice-level on /guestbook/ only. Axe emits pseudoContent + imgNode incomplete entries for inputs whose parent or sibling uses an image (our notecard texture webp or SVG ornament). Real contrast is fine: text is --notecard-ink on solid --paper (8.8:1, passes AA); placeholder is 0.75 alpha of --notecard-ink on --paper (4.55:1, passes AA). Confirmed manually. This cap applies ONLY to incomplete results — any hard contrast violation on this page still trips an error.
